title: Eco Leaf Startup Logo
prompt: Premium modern vector logo design for an eco startup. Minimalist abstract leaf integrated with a circular growth cycle symbol, clean flat design style, perfectly balanced geometric composition, fresh green and pure white color palette, isolated on a white background, no text.

title: Tech Spark Logo
prompt: Modern professional technology logo design. A simple glowing energy spark icon seamlessly connected to subtle, clean circuit board trace lines, sleek geometric vector style, blue and silver gradient palette, clean negative space, isolated on a dark background, no text.

title: Cafe Bean Logo
prompt: Warm and inviting logo design for a cozy cafe. Featuring an abstract coffee bean intertwined with a gentle rising steam icon, clean minimalist vector style, soft rounded shapes, rich cream and deep espresso brown color palette, centered emblem, no text.

title: Fitness Pulse Logo
prompt: Energetic professional fitness and athletics logo design. A dynamic heartbeat pulse line forming the top of a strong shield silhouette, modern athletic vector style, bold crimson red and dark charcoal grey color palette, strong high-contrast readability, no text.

title: Creative Studio Logo
prompt: Elegant minimalist logo concept for a creative studio. A single clean abstract brush stroke swoosh combined with a delicate four-point star accent, modern flat vector design, coral pink and navy blue color palette, perfectly balanced emblem, no text.
